components.name: BoringVault
components.author: Veda Labs
components.purpose: Enterprise-grade modular vault framework for secure and flexible DeFi vaults used as the core vault system in ether.fi.

components.name: LayerZero Cross-Chain Bridge
components.author: LayerZero Labs
components.purpose: Cross-chain messaging and bridging infrastructure enabling vault tokens like weETH to function across multiple blockchains.

components.name: EigenLayer
components.author: EigenLayer Team
components.purpose: Ethereum restaking middleware integrated for liquid restaking of ETH via ether.fi.

components.name: Liquid HYPE Yield Vault
components.author: Midas
components.purpose: A specialized yield vault powered by Midas infrastructure, used within ether.fi for diversified yield opportunities.

components.name: Hypernative
components.author: Hypernative
components.purpose: Real-time threat detection and pause control mechanism for vault safety and security in ether.fi.
